rationale: Routine billing notification, archivable, fully handleable.

input.subject: Q3 metrics question
input.summary: Investor asking for clarification on the Q3 ARR breakdown ahead of board prep

rationale: Substantive reply, draft a response with numbers and have the human send.

input.subject: Speaking slot at Stanford on launch week
input.summary: Invitation to speak the same week as a product launch; conflict with priorities

rationale: Strategy decision tied to a relationship and a public commitment; surface only.

input.subject: Cold connect
input.summary: Generic LinkedIn-style cold outreach from a recruiter not in the active pipeline

rationale: Low-value cold reach, not on the active job search list; defer with a polite decline template available.

input.subject: Tomorrow 10:00 panel
input.summary: Calendar event with no agenda, no host, no description; possible placeholder

rationale: Ambiguous calendar item that affects time on a busy day; the human needs to decide whether it stays.

input.subject: Weekly newsletter
input.summary: Recurring podcast/newsletter; same sender appears weekly

rationale: Recurring marketing newsletter, archive after digest rollup.

input.summary: Warm-list dormant: Daniel Mercer, 90 days since last touch

rationale: Relationship maintenance, draft a re-engagement note; user approves before send.

input.subject: Priority call on the migration
input.summary: Direct ask from manager to choose between two engineering paths

rationale: Strategy decision, manager-direct; surface with both options laid out, do not act.

input.summary: Slack mention: <@me> can you confirm Tuesday is still on?

rationale: Quick confirmation reply, draftable, human posts via tools/slack-respond.mjs.

input.subject: Re: onsite timing
input.summary: Active interview pipeline confirming onsite slot

rationale: Touches a high-stakes relationship and a near-term commitment; surface with calendar options, do not auto-reply.

input.subject: [anthropic-pm-interview] !high
input.summary: Self-forwarded thread tagged with project slug and priority

rationale: User explicitly captured into the project; draft a follow-up based on the body.

input.subject: Your AWS bill
input.summary: Monthly cloud billing receipt, recurring sender

rationale: Automated finance notification; archive after the newsletter-digest hook rolls it up.

input.subject: Quick question about your Substack piece
input.summary: Operator at a portfolio company asking a substantive question about a recent essay

rationale: Substantive reply that needs the user's voice; draft, do not send.
User's own time block, no action needed.

input.subject: You are invited
input.summary: Generic event invite, no relationship to active priorities, no RSVP urgency

rationale: Low-signal invite; defer with a reason (off-thesis for current priorities).
